use_cases: Displaying vertically scrolling testimonials or customer quotes in an animated showcase section
Creating animated announcements or news ticker effects for landing pages
Implementing scrolling feature lists or benefit highlights in hero sections
Adding dynamic text content animation for branding or promotional displays
Building auto-scrolling partner logos or brand name displays
ai_summary: A vertical text marquee component from tom_ui that creates smooth infinite scroll animations for text content. Uses CSS keyframes with configurable speed, height, and mask gradient for elegant edge fade effects. The component renders children in a seamless vertical loop, ideal for displaying testimonials, announcements, or feature lists in a visually engaging animated format. Pure CSS animation with no JavaScript dependencies.
